metadata.file_name: Everything But The Girl, Todd Terry - Missing (Todd Terry Club Mix  US Radio Edit).flac
metadata.title: Missing (Todd Terry Club Mix / US Radio Edit)
metadata.artist: Everything But The Girl, Todd Terry
metadata.lyrics:
[00:19.94] Step off the train
[00:23.54] Walking down your street again
[00:28.18] Past your door, but you don't live there anymore
[00:35.04] It's years since you've been there
[00:40.51] Now you've disappeared somewhere, like outer space
[00:45.97] You've found some better place
[00:49.82] And I miss you, like the deserts miss the rain
[00:57.62] And I miss you, like the deserts miss the rain
[01:06.74] Could you be dead?
[01:10.06] You always were two steps ahead, of everyone
[01:17.77] We'd walk behind while you would run
[01:21.69] I look up at your house
[01:27.08] And I can almost hear you shout down to me
[01:32.52] Where I always used to be
[01:36.52] And I miss you, like the deserts miss the rain
[01:44.28] And I miss you, like the deserts miss the rain
[01:53.48] Back on the train, I ask why did I come again?
[02:01.10] Can I confess, I've been hanging round your old address?
[02:08.90] And the years have proved
[02:13.06] To offer, nothing since you moved
[02:17.93] You're long gone, but I can't move on
[02:22.97] And I miss you, like the deserts miss the rain
[02:30.92] And I miss you, like the deserts miss the rain (And I miss you)
[02:38.15] I step off the train
[02:43.35] I'm walking down your street again
[02:48.18] Past your door, I guess you don't live there anymore
[02:54.97] It's years since you've been there
[03:00.36] And now you've disappeared somewhere, like outer space
[03:07.57] You've found some better place
[03:09.86] And I miss you, like the deserts miss the rain
[03:17.62] And I miss you, yeah, like the deserts miss the rain (And I miss you)
[03:25.31] And I miss you, like the deserts miss the rain
[03:33.15] And I miss you, yeah, like the deserts miss the rain
[03:39.64] The deserts miss the rain
[03:45.58] (Like the deserts miss the rain)
[03:47.15] Like the deserts miss the rain
[03:53.29] (Like the deserts miss the rain)
[03:56.42] And I miss you, yeah, like the deserts miss the rain
[04:03.08] Oh and I miss you
[04:05.93]
